q: Name one source of Canadian law.
q_fa: یکی از منابع قانون کانادا را نام ببرید.
options: Both Common law and Civil law
book_text: Canada's legal system is based on a combination of common law (which applies in all provinces except Quebec) and civil law (which applies in Quebec). Common law is one source of Canadian law.

q: What is 'Magna Carta'?
q_fa: 'مگنا کارتا' چیست؟
book_text: The Magna Carta (Great Charter of Freedoms) was signed in 1215 in England. It included rights and freedoms that were later brought to Canada.

q: When was the Magna Carta signed?
q_fa: مگنا کارتا چه زمانی امضا شد؟
book_text: The Magna Carta (Great Charter of Freedoms) was signed in 1215 in England. It included rights and freedoms that were later brought to Canada.

q: What does the Great Charter of Freedom include?
q_fa: منشور بزرگ آزادی شامل چه چیزهایی است؟
options: Freedom of thought, belief, opinion and expression
Freedom of peaceful assembly and association
book_text: The Magna Carta included fundamental freedoms such as freedom of conscience and religion, freedom of thought, belief, opinion and expression, and freedom of peaceful assembly and association.

q: What is 'Habeas corpus'?
q_fa: 'Habeas corpus' چیست؟
book_text: Habeas corpus is the right to challenge unlawful detention by the state. This right comes from English common law.

q: When was the Constitution of Canada amended to include the Charter of Rights and Freedoms?
q_fa: قانون اساسی کانادا چه زمانی اصلاح شد تا منشور حقوق و آزادی‌ها را شامل شود؟

q: Who proclaimed the amended Constitution of Canada in 1982?
q_fa: چه کسی قانون اساسی اصلاح شده کانادا را در سال 1982 اعلام کرد؟
book_text: Queen Elizabeth II proclaimed the amended Constitution of Canada in Ottawa on April 17, 1982.

q: What are the two principles upon which Canada is founded?
q_fa: دو اصل بنیادی که کانادا بر اساس آن‌ها تأسیس شده چیست؟
book_text: Canada is founded on the principles of peace, order and good government.

q: With which words does the Canadian Charter of Rights and Freedoms begin?
q_fa: منشور حقوق و آزادی‌های کانادا با کدام کلمات آغاز می‌شود؟
book_text: The Canadian Charter of Rights and Freedoms begins with the words: 'Whereas Canada is founded upon principles that recognize the supremacy of God and the rule of law...'

q: What are 'mobility rights'?
q_fa: 'حقوق جابجایی' چیست؟
options: Right to enter and leave Canada
Right to work anywhere in Canada
book_text: Mobility rights include the right to enter and leave Canada, and the right to move between provinces to live and work.

q: Which three rights are included in the Canadian Charter of Rights and Freedoms?
q_fa: کدام سه حق در منشور حقوق و آزادی‌های کانادا گنجانده شده است؟
options: Mobility rights, Aboriginal rights, Official language rights
Voting rights, Education rights, Health rights
Property rights, Business rights, Tax rights
book_text: The Charter includes mobility rights, Aboriginal rights, and official language rights.

q: True or False: French and English do not have equal status in Parliament and throughout the government.
q_fa: درست یا غلط: فرانسوی و انگلیسی در پارلمان و سراسر دولت وضعیت برابر ندارند.
book_text: French and English have equal status in Parliament and throughout the government.

q: Canadians work hard to respect:
q_fa: کانادایی‌ها برای احترام به چه چیزهایی تلاش می‌کنند؟
book_text: Canadians work hard to respect both individual rights and collective rights.

q: What is a fundamental characteristic of the Canadian heritage and identity?
q_fa: ویژگی اساسی میراث و هویت کانادایی چیست؟
book_text: Multiculturalism and bilingualism are fundamental characteristics of the Canadian heritage and identity.

q: What are three responsibilities of Canadian citizenship?
q_fa: سه مسئولیت شهروندی کانادا چیست؟
options: Obey the law, Take responsibility for oneself and family, Serve on a jury
Pay taxes, Vote, Serve in military
book_text: Responsibilities of citizenship include obeying the law, taking responsibility for oneself and one's family, and serving on a jury when called upon.

q: When called to do so, serving on a jury is:
q_fa: هنگامی که فراخوانده می‌شوید، خدمت در هیئت منصفه چیست؟
book_text: Serving on a jury when called to do so is a legal duty of citizenship.

q: True or False: There is no compulsory military service in Canada.
q_fa: درست یا غلط: در کانادا خدمت نظامی اجباری وجود ندارد.
book_text: There is no compulsory military service in Canada.

q: What is a noble way to contribute to Canada and an excellent career choice?
q_fa: راه نجیبانه برای کمک به کانادا و انتخاب عالی شغلی چیست؟
book_text: Military service is a noble way to contribute to Canada and an excellent career choice.

q: Name two key documents that contain our rights and freedoms.
q_fa: دو سند کلیدی که شامل حقوق و آزادی‌های ماست را نام ببرید.
options: Magna Carta and Charter of Rights
book_text: The Constitution and the Canadian Charter of Rights and Freedoms are two key documents that contain our rights and freedoms.

q: Identify four (4) rights that Canadians enjoy.
q_fa: چهار حق که کانادایی‌ها از آن برخوردارند را شناسایی کنید.
options: Mobility rights, Aboriginal rights, Official language rights, Multiculturalism rights
book_text: Canadians enjoy mobility rights, Aboriginal rights, official language rights, and multiculturalism rights.

q: What are the three main groups of Aboriginal peoples?
q_fa: سه گروه اصلی بومیان چه کسانی هستند؟
book_text: Aboriginal peoples are the first people to live in Canada. The three main groups are: First Nations, Métis, and Inuit.

q: Who are the Métis?
q_fa: متی‌ها چه کسانی هستند؟
options: People of mixed Aboriginal and European ancestry
book_text: The Métis are a distinct people of mixed Aboriginal and European ancestry.

q: What does the word 'Inuit' mean?
q_fa: کلمه 'Inuit' به چه معناست؟
book_text: Inuit means 'the people' in the Inuktitut language.

q: When did English settlement begin in Canada?
q_fa: استعمار انگلیسی در کانادا چه زمانی آغاز شد؟
book_text: English settlement began in 1497 when John Cabot explored Canada's east coast.

q: Who established the first European settlements?
q_fa: چه کسی اولین سکونتگاه‌های اروپایی را تأسیس کرد؟
book_text: John Cabot, Jacques Cartier, and Samuel de Champlain all played important roles in establishing the first European settlements in Canada.

q: Who passed the Quebec Act of 1774?
q_fa: چه کسی قانون کبک 1774 را تصویب کرد؟
book_text: The British Parliament passed the Quebec Act of 1774, which allowed French Canadians to maintain their language, religion, and civil law.

q: Which Act granted to the Canadas, for the first time, legislative assemblies elected by the people?
q_fa: کدام قانون برای اولین بار به کانادا، مجامع قانونگذاری منتخب مردم را اعطا کرد؟
book_text: The Constitutional Act of 1791 granted to the Canadas, for the first time, legislative assemblies elected by the people.

q: Who was Lieutenant Colonel John Graves Simcoe?
q_fa: سرهنگ جان گریوز سیمکو چه کسی بود؟
book_text: Lieutenant Colonel John Graves Simcoe was the first Governor of Upper Canada (now Ontario).

q: When did the British Parliament abolish slavery throughout the Empire?
q_fa: پارلمان بریتانیا چه زمانی برده‌داری را در سراسر امپراتوری لغو کرد؟
book_text: The British Parliament abolished slavery throughout the Empire in 1833.

q: Name 3 fathers of Confederation.
q_fa: 3 پدر کنفدراسیون را نام ببرید.
options: Sir John A. Macdonald, George-Étienne Cartier, George Brown
William Lyon Mackenzie King, Pierre Trudeau, Lester Pearson
John Cabot, Jacques Cartier, Samuel de Champlain
book_text: The Fathers of Confederation include Sir John A. Macdonald, George-Étienne Cartier, and George Brown, among others.

q: Which phrase embodied the vision for the Dominion of Canada?
q_fa: کدام عبارت دیدگاه برای دومینیون کانادا را تجسم می‌کرد؟
book_text: The phrase 'A Mari Usque Ad Mare' (From sea to sea) embodied the vision for the Dominion of Canada.

q: What made it possible for immigrants to settle in Western Canada?
q_fa: چه چیزی مهاجرت به غرب کانادا را ممکن ساخت؟
book_text: The Canadian Pacific Railway made it possible for immigrants to settle in Western Canada.

q: When did the House of Commons recognize that the Quebecois form a nation within a united Canada?
q_fa: مجلس عوام چه زمانی به رسمیت شناخت که کبکی‌ها یک ملت در یک کانادای متحد تشکیل می‌دهند؟
book_text: In 2006, the House of Commons recognized that the Quebecois form a nation within a united Canada.

q: What is 'La Francophonie'?
q_fa: 'La Francophonie' چیست؟
book_text: La Francophonie is an international organization of French-speaking nations.

q: Why is Terry Fox a Canadian national hero?
q_fa: چرا تری فاکس یک قهرمان ملی کانادایی است؟
options: He ran across Canada to raise money for cancer research
book_text: Terry Fox is a Canadian national hero because he ran across Canada to raise money for cancer research, despite having lost a leg to cancer.

q: Who was John Buchan?
q_fa: جان بوکان چه کسی بود؟
book_text: John Buchan was the 15th Governor General of Canada and a famous writer.

q: Who is Marjorie Turner-Bailey?
q_fa: مارجوری ترنر-بیلی کیست؟
options: First Black woman elected to the Nova Scotia legislature
book_text: Marjorie Turner-Bailey was the first Black woman elected to the Nova Scotia legislature.

q: What is the origin of Habeas corpus?
q_fa: منشاء Habeas corpus چیست؟
book_text: Habeas corpus comes from British common law.

q: What does Confederation mean?
q_fa: کنفدراسیون به چه معناست؟
book_text: Confederation means the union of provinces and territories into a single country, creating a federal system.

q: What did the Canadian Pacific Railway symbolize?
q_fa: راه‌آهن اقیانوس آرام کانادا نماد چه چیزی بود؟
options: Both economic development and national unity
book_text: The Canadian Pacific Railway symbolized both economic development and national unity, connecting Canada from coast to coast.

q: What does it mean to say that Canada is a constitutional monarchy?
q_fa: این که بگوییم کانادا یک سلطنت مشروطه است به چه معناست؟
options: Canada has a king or queen
The monarch is the head of state
The monarch's powers are limited by the Constitution

q: What are the three branches of government?
q_fa: سه شاخه دولت چه هستند؟
options: Prime Minister, Governor General, Supreme Court

q: What is the difference between the role of the Queen and that of the Prime Minister?
q_fa: تفاوت بین نقش ملکه و نخست‌وزیر چیست؟
options: Queen is head of state, PM is head of government
Queen makes laws, PM enforces them
Queen is elected, PM is appointed

q: What is the highest honour that Canadians can receive?
q_fa: بالاترین افتخاری که کانادایی‌ها می‌توانند دریافت کنند چیست؟

q: When you go to vote on election day, what do you do?
q_fa: وقتی در روز انتخابات برای رأی دادن می‌روید، چه کاری انجام می‌دهید؟
options: Mark an X next to your chosen candidate
book_text: On election day, you mark an X next to the name of your chosen candidate on the ballot.

q: Who is entitled to vote in Canadian federal elections?
q_fa: چه کسانی حق رأی در انتخابات فدرال کانادا را دارند؟
book_text: Canadian citizens who are 18 years of age or older are entitled to vote in federal elections.

q: True or False: In Canada, are you obliged to tell other people how you voted?
q_fa: درست یا غلط: در کانادا، آیا موظف هستید به دیگران بگویید که چگونه رأی داده‌اید؟
book_text: In Canada, you are not obliged to tell other people how you voted. Voting is secret.

q: After an election, which party forms the government?
q_fa: پس از انتخابات، کدام حزب دولت را تشکیل می‌دهد؟
options: The party with the most votes
The party with the most seats in the House of Commons
The party chosen by the Governor General
book_text: After an election, the party with the most seats in the House of Commons usually forms the government.

q: What is a minority government?
q_fa: دولت اقلیت چیست؟
options: Government with less than 50% of seats
book_text: A minority government is a government that has less than 50% of the seats in the House of Commons.

q: What is written on an election ballot?
q_fa: روی برگه رأی چه چیزی نوشته شده است؟
book_text: An election ballot shows the candidate names and their party affiliations.

q: What are the three levels of government?
q_fa: سه سطح دولت چه هستند؟
book_text: The three levels of government in Canada are: federal, provincial (or territorial), and municipal (local).

q: What is the role of the courts in Canada?
q_fa: نقش دادگاه‌ها در کانادا چیست؟
book_text: The courts interpret and apply the law. They do not make laws or enforce them.

q: True or False: In Canada, are you allowed to question the police about their service or conduct?
q_fa: درست یا غلط: در کانادا، آیا مجاز هستید از پلیس درباره خدمات یا رفتارشان سؤال کنید؟
book_text: In Canada, you are allowed to question the police about their service or conduct.

q: What are the responsibilities of the federal government?
q_fa: مسئولیت‌های دولت فدرال چیست؟
book_text: The federal government is responsible for national defence, foreign policy, citizenship, and other matters of national concern.

q: Which of the following are the responsibilities of the provincial government?
q_fa: کدام یک از موارد زیر مسئولیت‌های دولت استانی است؟
book_text: Provincial governments are responsible for education, health care, natural resources, and other matters within their provinces.

q: Who appoints the judges of the Supreme Court of Canada?
q_fa: چه کسی قضات دادگاه عالی کانادا را منصوب می‌کند؟
book_text: The Governor General, on the advice of the Prime Minister, appoints the judges of the Supreme Court of Canada.

q: What do you call a law before it is passed?
q_fa: قبل از تصویب، قانون را چه می‌نامند؟
book_text: A law before it is passed is called a bill.

q: What is the final step before a bill becomes a law?
q_fa: آخرین مرحله قبل از تبدیل شدن یک لایحه به قانون چیست؟
book_text: The final step before a bill becomes a law is Royal Assent, given by the Governor General or the monarch.

q: What is meant by the term 'responsible government'?
q_fa: اصطلاح 'دولت مسئول' به چه معناست؟
book_text: Responsible government means that the government is responsible to the people through Parliament.

q: What are the three key characteristics of Canada's system of government?
q_fa: سه ویژگی کلیدی سیستم حکومتی کانادا چیست؟
book_text: Canada's system of government has three key characteristics: federalism, parliamentary democracy, and constitutional monarchy.

q: Name the five regions of Canada.
q_fa: پنج منطقه کانادا را نام ببرید.
options: Atlantic, Central, Prairie, West Coast, North
book_text: Canada has five distinct regions: Atlantic Region, Central Canada, Prairie Region, West Coast, and North.

q: Which region covers more than one-third of Canada?
q_fa: کدام منطقه بیش از یک سوم کانادا را پوشش می‌دهد؟
book_text: The Northern Territories cover more than one-third of Canada's land mass.

q: The mountain range located between Alberta and British Columbia is called:
q_fa: رشته کوه واقع شده بین آلبرتا و بریتیش کلمبیا نامیده می‌شود:
book_text: The Rocky Mountains are located between Alberta and British Columbia.

q: What provinces are located in the Prairie Region?
q_fa: کدام استان‌ها در منطقه Prairie قرار دارند؟
book_text: The Prairie Region includes the provinces of Manitoba, Saskatchewan, and Alberta.

q: The St. Lawrence River is the major river in:
q_fa: رودخانه سنت لارنس رودخانه اصلی در:
book_text: The St. Lawrence River is the major river in Central Canada.

q: The mineral rich rock formation in the northern part of Central Canada is called:
q_fa: تشکیلات سنگی غنی از مواد معدنی در قسمت شمالی کانادای مرکزی نامیده می‌شود:
book_text: The Canadian Shield is a mineral-rich rock formation in the northern part of Central Canada.

q: The only Canadian territory which shares a border with another country is:
q_fa: تنها قلمرو کانادایی که با کشور دیگری مرز مشترک دارد:
book_text: Yukon is the only Canadian territory that shares a border with another country (the United States).

q: What provinces are referred to as the Atlantic Provinces?
q_fa: کدام استان‌ها به عنوان استان‌های آتلانتیک شناخته می‌شوند؟
options: Nova Scotia, New Brunswick, Prince Edward Island, Newfoundland and Labrador
book_text: The Atlantic Provinces are Nova Scotia, New Brunswick, Prince Edward Island, and Newfoundland and Labrador.

q: The provinces of the Atlantic Region and their capital cities are:
q_fa: استان‌های منطقه آتلانتیک و پایتخت‌های آن‌ها:
book_text: The Atlantic Region provinces and their capitals are: Nova Scotia (Halifax), New Brunswick (Fredericton), Prince Edward Island (Charlottetown), and Newfoundland and Labrador (St. John's).

q: The territories and their capital cities are:
q_fa: قلمروها و پایتخت‌های آن‌ها:
book_text: The territories and their capitals are: Yukon (Whitehorse), Northwest Territories (Yellowknife), and Nunavut (Iqaluit).

q: Which region is known as the industrial and manufacturing heartland of Canada?
q_fa: کدام منطقه به عنوان قلب صنعتی و تولیدی کانادا شناخته می‌شود؟
book_text: Central Canada is known as the industrial and manufacturing heartland of Canada.

q: What provinces are located in the Atlantic Region?
q_fa: کدام استان‌ها در منطقه آتلانتیک قرار دارند؟
options: Nova Scotia, New Brunswick, PEI, Newfoundland and Labrador
book_text: The Atlantic Region includes Nova Scotia, New Brunswick, Prince Edward Island, and Newfoundland and Labrador.

q: What is the capital of Canada?
q_fa: پایتخت کانادا چیست؟
book_text: Ottawa is the capital of Canada.

q: Which province has the most bilingual Canadians?
q_fa: کدام استان بیشترین کانادایی‌های دوزبانه را دارد؟
book_text: Quebec has the most bilingual Canadians.

q: Which province is one of the most productive agricultural regions in the world?
q_fa: کدام استان یکی از مولدترین مناطق کشاورزی در جهان است؟
book_text: Saskatchewan is one of the most productive agricultural regions in the world.

q: What is the Okanagan Valley famous for?
q_fa: دره اوکاناگان به چه چیزی معروف است؟
book_text: The Okanagan Valley is famous for its fruit orchards and vineyards.

q: Where do the majority of Métis people live in Canada?
q_fa: اکثریت مردم متی در کانادا کجا زندگی می‌کنند؟
book_text: The majority of Métis people live in the Prairie Provinces.

q: Why is the North sometimes called the 'Land of the Midnight Sun'?
q_fa: چرا شمال گاهی اوقات 'سرزمین خورشید نیمه‌شب' نامیده می‌شود؟
options: The sun doesn't set in summer
book_text: The North is sometimes called the 'Land of the Midnight Sun' because the sun doesn't set in summer.

q: Which three minerals are still mined in the territories today?
q_fa: کدام سه ماده معدنی امروزه هنوز در قلمروها استخراج می‌شوند؟
book_text: Diamonds, gold, and zinc are still mined in the territories today.

q: The five regions of Canada are Atlantic Region, __________, __________, West Coast and __________.
q_fa: پنج منطقه کانادا عبارتند از: منطقه آتلانتیک، __________، __________، ساحل غربی و __________.
book_text: The five regions of Canada are Atlantic Region, Central Canada, Prairie Region, West Coast, and North.

q: When did Canada become a country?
q_fa: کانادا چه زمانی به یک کشور تبدیل شد؟

q: When did the British North America Act come into effect?
q_fa: قانون آمریکای شمالی بریتانیا چه زمانی به اجرا درآمد؟
book_text: The British North America Act came into effect on July 1, 1867, creating the Dominion of Canada.

q: When is Canada Day?
q_fa: روز کانادا چه زمانی است؟
book_text: Canada Day is celebrated on July 1st, the anniversary of Confederation.

q: What happened at the Battle of the Plains of Abraham?
q_fa: در نبرد دشت‌های آبراهام چه اتفاقی افتاد؟
book_text: At the Battle of the Plains of Abraham in 1759, the British defeated the French forces, leading to British control of New France.

q: Who was Sir Louis-Hippolyte La Fontaine?
q_fa: سر لوئی-هیپولیت لافونتن چه کسی بود؟
book_text: Sir Louis-Hippolyte La Fontaine was a leader of responsible government in Canada.

q: What is the significance of the discovery of insulin by Sir Frederick Banting and Charles Best?
q_fa: اهمیت کشف انسولین توسط سر فردریک بانتیگ و چارلز بست چیست؟
book_text: The discovery of insulin by Sir Frederick Banting and Charles Best saved millions of lives worldwide and won the Nobel Prize.

q: Who was General Sir Arthur Currie?
q_fa: ژنرال سر آرتور کری چه کسی بود؟
book_text: General Sir Arthur Currie was Canada's greatest soldier and led Canadian forces in the First World War.

q: Approximately how many Canadians served in the First World War?
q_fa: تقریباً چند کانادایی در جنگ جهانی اول خدمت کردند؟
book_text: More than 600,000 Canadians served in the First World War.

q: When is Remembrance Day celebrated?
q_fa: روز یادبود چه زمانی جشن گرفته می‌شود؟
book_text: Remembrance Day is celebrated on November 11 to honour those who served and died in wars.

q: When was Canada's first financial institution opened?
q_fa: اولین مؤسسه مالی کانادا چه زمانی افتتاح شد؟
book_text: Canada's first financial institution, the Bank of Montreal, was opened in 1817.

q: Who was the first person to draw a map of Canada's east coast?
q_fa: اولین کسی که نقشه ساحل شرقی کانادا را ترسیم کرد چه کسی بود؟
book_text: John Cabot was the first person to draw a map of Canada's east coast in 1497.

q: True or False: In 1813, Government House and the Parliament Buildings were accidentally burned.
q_fa: درست یا غلط: در سال 1813، خانه دولت و ساختمان‌های پارلمان به طور تصادفی سوزانده شدند.
book_text: In 1813, Government House and the Parliament Buildings were burned by American forces during the War of 1812, not accidentally.

q: Who renamed the colony 'Province of Quebec'?
q_fa: چه کسی مستعمره را 'استان کبک' نامگذاری مجدد کرد؟
book_text: The British renamed the colony 'Province of Quebec' in 1763 after the Treaty of Paris.

q: What was the Underground Railroad?
q_fa: راه‌آهن زیرزمینی چه بود؟
options: A network helping slaves escape to freedom
book_text: The Underground Railroad was a network of secret routes and safe houses that helped slaves escape to freedom in Canada.

q: In which year did the British Parliament ban the purchase and sale of slaves?
q_fa: در کدام سال پارلمان بریتانیا خرید و فروش برده را ممنوع کرد؟
book_text: The British Parliament banned the purchase and sale of slaves in 1807.

q: Who was the first leader of a responsible government in Canada in 1849?
q_fa: اولین رهبر دولت مسئول در کانادا در سال 1849 چه کسی بود؟
